calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-09-2020 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-27-2020 Continued To Dec-22-20 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEFAULT HEARING (PROVE UP)
Off Calendar Nov-05-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Norman Sabel.
Dept. 514. Judge: Gerardo C. Sandoval. Clerk: Lyssette Bareng. Reporter: Giselle Casey, CSR #8098. Telephone: 415-551-3680. Email: gcasey@sftc.org.

John F. Lee, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Andrew Paul Kangas who was also present, placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by respondent Norman Sabel.
Plaintiff's Complaint for Personal Injury and Property Damage was filed on October 12, 2017.
Personal service of plaintiff's Summons, Complaint and accompanying documents on defendant Norman Sabel occured on February 15, 2019.
Default as to defendant Norman Sabel was entered on January 15, 2020.
DOE defendants were DISMISSED on January 15, 2020.
Statement of Damages was filed on January 21, 2020.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Andrew Paul Kangas, and against the defaulted defendant Norman Sabel, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $4,000.00.
Prejudgment Interest - $1,233.65.
Attorney Fees - Waived.
Costs - $761.95.
Other - $30.00.

Total - $6,025.60.

Counsel for plaintiff shall prepare the proposed Judgment and submit same to the Court for review and signature.

DEFAULT HEARING (PROVE UP)
